content: Node.js terminal polling UX for device flow: Use process.stdout.write with clearLine/cursorTo for inline spinner updates. Standard pattern: print 'Waiting for approval... [spinner]' then clear and rewrite on each poll tick. No external dependencies - built-in readline module provides cursorTo(stream, 0) and clearLine(stream, 0). Use setInterval for spinner animation, clearInterval on success/failure. Print URL and user code before starting spinner loop. On success: clear line, print success. On timeout: print timeout error and process.exit(1).
